message:
feat(web): Wire CommandPalette context to real phage store state

Connect CommandPalette's AppContext to actual application state from
usePhageStore instead of hardcoded placeholder values. This enables
context-aware command filtering where commands are shown/hidden based
on actual app state.

Changes:
- Add store selectors: currentPhage, diffReferenceSequence, activeSimulationId
- Compute hasPhage from Boolean(currentPhage) instead of hardcoded true
- Compute hasDiffRef from Boolean(diffReferenceSequence)
- Compute simulationActive from Boolean(activeSimulationId)
- Fix viewMode mapping: 'aa' → 'amino' to match AppContext interface
- Update useMemo dependency array to include all reactive values

This ensures commands like "Clear diff reference" only appear when a
diff reference is actually set, and simulation commands reflect whether
a simulation is currently running.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
